Off Calendar Nov-30-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Larry Schapiro, Esq. 916-320-2009 for Plaintiff/Moving party through Court Call.
Jennifer Stoughton, Deputy City Attorney 415-554-3800 for Defendant/opposing party.

Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules adopts the tentative ruling with 1 modification as follows:

PLAINTIFF SAMSON ASRAT's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Special Interrogatories, Set One.

Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Special Interrogatories is granted in part. The motion is granted as to numbers 5, 6, 19, 20, and 32. Although defendant provided amended responses to these interrogatories after the July 2017 order of JPT Catalanotti, the amended responses are not code compliant because they opt to provide documents under CCP Section 2030.230 but do not properly exercise the option. Defendant's responses fail to "specify the records from which the answer may be derived or ascertained and afford to the party by whom the interrogatory was proposed reasonable opportunity to examine, audit or inspect such records and to make copies thereof or compilations, abstracts or summaries therefrom." CCP Section 2030.230 (c). Further, these responses do not represent that the accompanying documents are "the interrogated party's present best and complete answer." Fuss v. Sup. Ct. (1969) 273 Cal.App. 2d 807, 815-816. The motion is denied as to numbers 33 and 35 because defendant's amended responses to these interrogatories comply with the July 2017 order.

In addition, Defendant is to provide specific Bates numbers identifying the documents responsive to each interrogatory for which Defendant opted to respond under CCP section 2030.230.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and must email it directly to the Judge Pro Tem at mtderish@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)
